summary: Phase 3 comprehensive testing completed. Backend 22/22 tests pass. All 7 frontend feature areas verified: Website Tab (10 sections), Email Templates (9 templates, toggle, editor), References CRUD, Customer payment checkboxes, Website settings save, Cart payment modes logic. IndentationError in articles.py was already fixed. One minor React key warning fixed in ReferencesSection.tsx.

issues: currency_for_country() in core/helpers.py only supports CAD and USD (not GBP, AUD, NZD etc.) - returns 'UNSUPPORTED' for GB customers. Pre-existing limitation not related to Phase 3.

action_items: (LOW) currency_for_country() in /app/backend/core/helpers.py should support GBP (GB), AUD (AU), NZD (NZ), etc. Currently only returns CAD and USD.
critical_code_review_comments: ReferencesSection.tsx: React Fragment key missing on map - FIXED in this iteration (changed <> to <React.Fragment key={ref.id}>)
currency_for_country() only supports US and CA - all other countries get UNSUPPORTED currency which is displayed in admin customer table. Consider adding GBP, AUD, NZD, SGD etc.
Cart.tsx lines 55-63: allowed_payment_modes logic is correct and properly falls back to legacy booleans.
seed_data_creation: Created test customer: test-phase3-payment@example.com (id: fe882a7c-33af-488c-bf04-16dcbb58c96b) for payment methods testing. Can be safely deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features all verified working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py (22 tests). Website tab has 10 sections all loading correctly. Email Templates shows 9 templates with toggle/edit. References CRUD working. Customer edit dialog has payment checkboxes. Admin credentials: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. One test customer was created: test-phase3-payment@example.com.

rca_of_issues.UNSUPPORTED_currency: currency_for_country() in /app/backend/core/helpers.py only has mappings for 'ca'/'canada' -> CAD and 'usa'/'us' -> USD. All other countries (GB, AU, NZ, IN, SG, ZA, etc.) return 'UNSUPPORTED'. Fix: add mappings for GBP (gb/uk), AUD (au/australia), NZD (nz), etc.
